subject: fix(pending-search): dispatch error event before searchQueueEmpty (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#503)
body:
* fix(pending-search): dispatch error event before searchQueueEmpty
* misc(event-order): single event statement

Move code around to make sure that we both have a proper event order with `searchQueueEmpty` after `result` or `error`.
